TSN.5.HD.ca2.title: The Pitch
TSN.5.HD.ca2.subtitle: The Vision
TSN.5.HD.ca2.description: After retiring from international soccer, Diana Matheson sets out to build what has never existed: a professional women's soccer league in Canada; moving between past and present, tracing the resilience of women who succeeded despite a system that worked against them and the urgency that drives the league's creation; as Matheson and her team take the first steps toward making the league real, they confront skepticism, institutional resistance, and the risk of starting from nothing.

The Bears did all the damage in the first half as they scored five tries and went into the break 35-0 up as Sam Worsley kicked five conversions.

TNT.Sports.3.HD.uk.subtitle: Stage 4
TNT.Sports.3.HD.uk.description: Coverage from the fourth stage of the race, a 138km route from Catanzaro to Cosenza. This stage last year saw a 189km route from Alberobello to Lecce that was won by Dutch cyclist Casper van Uden, as he picked up his one and only victory of the race. Great Britain's Simon Yates won last year's race ahead of Mexico's Isaac del Toro and Ecuador's Richard Carapaz.

HBO.East.us2.title: Half Man
HBO.East.us2.description: 1993. His mother asks Niall to lie in court about Ruben's violence, and he is conflicted. Ruben seems different now, so the decision weighs heavily on him.

HBO.East.us2.title: Euphoria
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: This Little Piggy
HBO.East.us2.description: As subscribers surge, Cassie and Maddy clash when the truth comes to light; Rue realizes she is in far too deep when Alamo grows increasingly suspicious; Jules' relationship teeters on the edge, and Lexi discovers her sister is once again threatening to invade her territory.

HBO.East.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: Songs for Raisa
HBO.East.us2.description: After setting boundaries with her parents, Katie makes a decision about her marriage to Archie, who has his own talk with Sunny about the future; then, as he grapples with Katie's independence, Greg prepares to say goodbye to his semester.

HBO.East.us2.title: The Comeback
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: Valerie Cherish
HBO.East.us2.description: Urged by NuNet to make a public statement in defense of AI, Valerie contemplates her future with or without How's That?!

HBO.East.us2.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
HBO.East.us2.description: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

HBO.East.us2.title: Black Adam
HBO.East.us2.description: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

HBO.East.us2.title: 38 at the Garden
HBO.East.us2.description: Point guard Jeremy Lin, an undrafted Harvard graduate, shocks fans, stuns his teammates and galvanizes Asians around the world during his landmark 2011-12 season with the New York Knicks and sparks the "Linsanity" craze.

HBO.East.us2.title: Christy
HBO.East.us2.description: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

HBO.East.us2.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: Shadow Docket
HBO.East.us2.description: John Oliver discusses the shadow docket, a shortcut to the Supreme Court which is rapidly advancing the Trump administration's agenda; some facts about turtles to spice things up.

HBO.East.us2.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
HBO.East.us2.description: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

HBO.East.us2.title: Call Me by Your Name
HBO.East.us2.description: It's the summer of 1983, and precocious 17-year-old Elio Perlman is spending the days with his family at their 17th-century villa in Lombardy, Italy. He soon meets Oliver, a handsome doctoral student who's working as an intern for Elio's father. Amid the sun-drenched splendor of their surroundings, Elio and Oliver discover the heady beauty of awakening desire over the course of a summer that will alter their lives forever.

HBO.East.us2.title: This Is Spinal Tap
HBO.East.us2.description: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

HBO.East.us2.title: Table 19
HBO.East.us2.description: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

HBO.East.us2.title: Twister
HBO.East.us2.description: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

HBO.West.us2.title: 38 at the Garden
HBO.West.us2.description: Point guard Jeremy Lin, an undrafted Harvard graduate, shocks fans, stuns his teammates and galvanizes Asians around the world during his landmark 2011-12 season with the New York Knicks and sparks the "Linsanity" craze.

HBO.West.us2.title: Christy
HBO.West.us2.description: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

HBO.West.us2.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
HBO.West.us2.description: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

HBO.West.us2.description: It's the summer of 1983, and precocious 17-year-old Elio Perlman is spending the days with his family at their 17th-century villa in Lombardy, Italy. He soon meets Oliver, a handsome doctoral student who's working as an intern for Elio's father. Amid the sun-drenched splendor of their surroundings, Elio and Oliver discover the heady beauty of awakening desire over the course of a summer that will alter their lives forever.

HBO.West.us2.description: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

HBO.West.us2.title: Table 19
HBO.West.us2.description: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

HBO.West.us2.description: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

HBO.West.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.West.us2.description: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

HBO.West.us2.description: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

HBO.West.us2.title: Prometheus
HBO.West.us2.description: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Lighthouse
HBO.West.us2.description: Two lighthouse keepers try to maintain their sanity while living on a remote and mysterious New England island in the 1890s.

HBO.West.us2.title: Dust Bunny
HBO.West.us2.description: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Crazy Rich Asians
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Rachel Chu is happy to accompany her longtime boyfriend, Nick, to his best friend's wedding in Singapore. She's also surprised to learn that Nick's family is extremely wealthy, and he's considered one of the country's most eligible bachelors. Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Friendship
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Comeback
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Valerie Bonds With the Cast
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Valerie offers to take her co-stars to lunch; Valerie learns why Juna is such a paparazzi favorite; Mark's daughter asks Valerie for a ride to school.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Comeback
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Valerie Stands Up for Aunt Sassy
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Valerie is concerned about her character's lines; Valerie rethinks her impulsive decision to adopt a puppy.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Amy Schumer: Live at the Apollo
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The comic brings her unique blend of honesty and unapologetic sense of humor to a performance at the historic Apollo Theater in New York.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Atsuko Okatsuka: The Intruder
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The comic-actor dishes on the futile art of impressing teenagers, attending a "Magic Mike Live" show with her grandmother, and the alarming reactions that she and her husband had to the unwanted presence of an intruder.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Dan Soder: Son of a Gary
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In a performance from The Bowery Ballroom in New York City, the comic discusses topics including drug dogs at the airport, the customer service generation, fake fights in the shower, and what it's like to have an alcoholic but fun dad.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Switch
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Neurotic Wally Mars has one bright spot in his life: his friendship with Kassie. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spring Breakers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Starter for 10
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Brian Jackson (James McAvoy), a working-class youth from Essex, gets a chance to prove himself when he is accepted to respected Bristol University. As Brian navigates his way through his first year there, he finds romance with two pretty students (Alice Eve, Rebecca Hall) and tries out for a popular TV program called "University Challenge.".

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Paddington 2
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Table 19
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Devil Wears Prada
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Get Him to the Greek

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Part II
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Told by Alex Rodriguez, this three-part documentary explores the demon he called A-Rod and the work he's done to become Alex once more.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alex vs. A-Rod
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Part III
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 2013, a newspaper exposé once again links Alex Rodriguez to performance-enhancing drugs, triggering Major League Baseball's longest-ever PED suspension and a storm of public hostility.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In deep space, the crew of the commercial starship Nostromo is awakened from their cryo-sleep capsules halfway through their journey home to investigate a distress call from an alien vessel. The terror begins when the crew encounters a nest of eggs inside the alien ship. An organism from inside an egg leaps out and attaches itself to one of the crew, causing him to fall into a coma.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Aliens
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After floating in space for 57 years, Lt. Ripley's shuttle is found by a deep space salvage team. Upon arriving at LV-426, the marines find only one survivor, a nine-year-old girl named Newt. But even these battle-hardened marines with all the latest weaponry are no match for the hundreds of aliens that have invaded the colony.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien 3
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Ellen Ripley (Sigourney Weaver) is the only survivor when she crash lands on Fiorina 161, a bleak wasteland inhabited by former inmates of the planet's maximum security prison. Once again, Ripley must face skepticism and the alien as it hunts down the prisoners and guards. Without weapons or modern technology of any kind, Ripley leads the men into battle against the terrifying creature.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien Resurrection
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Two hundred years have passed since Ellen Ripley died on Fiorina 161. Aboard the medical research vessel USM Auriga, a team of scientists clones Ripley from her extracted DNA and removes the alien Queen embryo which was growing inside her at the time of her death.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When the wealthy and ambitious Charles Bishop Weyland funds an expedition to Antarctica, he hopes to find a mysterious source of heat that has been detected. Led by a tough guide, Alexa Woods, Weyland and his team uncover a pyramid, but they also find malevolent parasitic aliens. Making matters worse, another extraterrestrial species, known as Predators, arrive to hunt the other aliens, with the humans caught in the middle of the conflict.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Residents (Steven Pasquale, Reiko Aylesworth, John Ortiz) of Gunnison, Colorado, are caught up in the crossfire when two deadly extraterrestrial species bring their longstanding conflict to Earth. On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Prometheus
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien: Covenant
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien: Romulus
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Freaky Tales
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dune: Part Two
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mortal Kombat
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mortal Kombat Annihilation
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Every generation, a portal opens up between the Outerworld and Earth. Emperor Shao Kahn (Brian Thompson), ruler of the mythical Outerworld, pounces the moment the portal reopens and slips through with his mighty warriors, intent on total domination and uniting the two worlds. However, he has only seven days to complete his task. In the meantime, opposition grows and warriors Sonya Blade (Sandra Hess), Jax (Lynn "Red" Williams), Kitana (Talisa Soto) and Liu Kang (Robin Shou) get ready for war.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mortal Kombat
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Part One
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After the success of "Piano Man," Billy Joel's career takes off with a string international hits and record-breaking tours.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Billy Joel: And So It Goes
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Part Two
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Through countless setbacks, Joel reinvents himself with a return to his roots and a residency at Madison Square Garden.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: A Minecraft Movie
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Battle of the Sexes
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Christy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Moonlight
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A look at three defining chapters in the life of Chiron, a young black man growing up in Miami. His epic journey to manhood is guided by the kindness, support and love of the community that helps raise him.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Uncut Gems
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A charismatic jeweler makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime. In a precarious high-wire act, he must balance business, family and adversaries on all sides in pursuit of the ultimate win.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Curse of Frankenstein
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Victor Frankenstein (Peter Cushing) is a brilliant scientist willing to stop at nothing in his quest to reanimate a deceased body. After alienating his longtime friend and partner, Paul Krempe (Robert Urquhart), with his extreme methods, Frankenstein assembles a hideous creature (Christopher Lee) out of dead body parts and succeeds in bringing it to life. But the monster is not as obedient or docile as Frankenstein expected, and it runs amok, resulting in murder and mayhem.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Game Night
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Wedding Crashers
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Chronicling the early experiences that shaped Brooks' comedic voice, from his childhood in Brooklyn, to his combat service in WWII, and the highs and lows of working in the Borscht Belt and the dawning era of television.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Charting Brooks' rise to superstardom and the enduring impact of his work on audiences and future generations of comedic writers and performers.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Greatest Showman
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Devil Wears Prada

Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. AMC.HD.us2.title: Rocky Balboa
AMC.HD.us2.description: Now long-retired, Rocky (Sylvester Stallone) runs a Philadelphia eatery and mourns the loss of his beloved wife, Adrian. Yearning to recapture a bit of his glory days, he plans to re-enter the ring for a few low-profile, local matches. All that changes when Rocky accepts a challenge to fight the world's reigning heavyweight champion, Mason "the Line" Dixon (Antonio Tarver).

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rocky V
AMC.HD.us2.description: Recently retired boxer Rocky Balboa (Sylvester Stallone) falls on hard times after his accountant mismanages his finances. He stages a comeback of sorts by mentoring fiery young boxer Tommy (Tommy Morrison), while also trying to mend his shaky relationship with his own son, Robert (Sage Stallone). These challenges prove to be at least as tough as any fight Rocky has faced in the ring. He wonders if he will be able to meet them and raise his arms in victory again.

AMC.HD.us2.title: True Lies
AMC.HD.us2.description: Secretly a spy but thought by his family to be a dull salesman, Harry Tasker (Arnold Schwarzenegger) is tracking down nuclear missiles in the possession of Islamic jihadist Aziz (Art Malik). Harry's mission is complicated when he realizes his neglected wife, Helen (Jamie Lee Curtis), is contemplating an affair with Simon (Bill Paxton), a used-car salesman who claims he's a spy. When Aziz kidnaps Harry and Helen, the secret agent must save the world and patch up his marriage at the same time.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Shawshank Redemption
AMC.HD.us2.description: Andy Dufresne (Tim Robbins) is sentenced to two consecutive life terms in prison for the murders of his wife and her lover and is sentenced to a tough prison. However, only Andy knows he didn't commit the crimes. While there, he forms a friendship with Red (Morgan Freeman), experiences brutality of prison life, adapts, helps the warden, etc., all in 19 years.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Unstoppable
AMC.HD.us2.description: When a massive, unmanned locomotive roars out of control, the threat is more ominous than just a derailment. The train is laden with toxic chemicals, and an accident would decimate human life and cause an environmental disaster. The only hope of bringing the train to a safe stop is in the hands of a veteran engineer (Denzel Washington) and a young conductor (Chris Pine), who must risk their lives to save those in the runaway's path. Inspired by true events.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Shooter
AMC.HD.us2.description: A top Marine sniper, Bob Lee Swagger, leaves the military after a mission goes awry and disappears without a trace. Swagger is coaxed back into service after high-profile government officials convince him to help thwart a plot against the President of the United States. Swagger realizes he has been betrayed and becomes the target of a nationwide manhunt. Instead of hiding, he seeks revenge against some of the most powerful and corrupt leaders in the free world.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rocky V

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
AMC.HD.us2.description: John Rambo (Sylvester Stallone) is doing hard time in jail when his former boss, Col. Trautman (Richard Crenna), offers him a deal. If Rambo travels to Vietnam to try to find the American prisoners of war, his criminal record will be expunged. Rambo takes the reconnaissance assignment and agrees not to get involved in any of the action. However, when his Vietnamese lover, Co Bao (Julia Nickson), is killed by American forces, Rambo forgets his promise and takes matters into his own hands.

AMC.HD.us2.title: First Blood
AMC.HD.us2.description: Vietnam veteran and drifter John J. Rambo wanders into a small Washington town in search of an old friend, but is met with intolerance and brutality by the local sheriff, Will Teasle. When Teasle and his deputies restrain and shave Rambo, he flashes back to his time as a prisoner of war and unleashes his fury on the officers. He narrowly escapes the manhunt, but it will take his former commander to save the hunters from the hunted.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rambo: Last Blood
AMC.HD.us2.description: Vietnam War veteran John Rambo tries to find some semblance of peace by raising horses on a ranch in Arizona. He's also developed a special familial bond with a woman named Maria and her teenage granddaughter Gabriela. But when a vicious Mexican cartel kidnaps Gabriela, Rambo crosses the border on a bloody and personal quest to rescue her and punish those responsible.

When he recuperates, the man suffers from total amnesia, without identity or background, except for a range of extraordinary talents in fighting, linguistic skills and self-defense that speak of a dangerous past. He sets out on a desperate search-assisted by the initially rebellious Marie, to discover who he really is, and why he's being lethally pursued by assassins.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Bourne Supremacy
AMC.HD.us2.description: Jason Bourne is living in India when he is framed by Russian agent Kirill for the theft of millions from the CIA; Kirill begins to pursue Bourne, intending to assassinate him -- but while Bourne and his girlfriend, Marie, are on the run, a shot meant for him kills her instead; vowing revenge, Bourne sets out to prove his innocence and bring the culprits to justice, but he has to evade CIA head Pamela Landry, who is convinced he is guilty.

AMC.HD.us2.description: Jason Bourne (Matt Damon) continues his international quest to uncover his true identity. From Russia to Europe to northern Africa to the United States, he must stay one step ahead of those who would capture or kill him before he has a chance to discover the truth.

AMC.HD.us2.title: U.S. Marshals
AMC.HD.us2.description: An airplane bearing gruff U.S. Marshal Sam Gerard (Tommy Lee Jones) crashes in the wilderness. On board the same flight is Mark Sheridan (Wesley Snipes), a federal prisoner accused of double murder, who escapes during the ensuing chaos, but not before rescuing several people from the wreckage. Gerard is ordered to hunt down the fugitive along with State Department agent John Royce (Robert Downey Jr.), and the two pursue Sheridan relentlessly, despite growing doubts about his guilt.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Enemy of the State
AMC.HD.us2.description: Corrupt National Security Agency official Thomas Reynolds (Jon Voight) has a congressman assassinated to assure the passage of expansive new surveillance legislation. When a videotape of the murder ends up in the hands of Robert Clayton Dean (Will Smith), a labor lawyer and dedicated family man, he is framed for murder. With the help of ex-intelligence agent Edward "Brill" Lyle (Gene Hackman), Dean attempts to throw Reynolds off his trail and prove his innocence.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games: The Ballad of Songbirds & Snakes
AMC.HD.us2.description: Years before he becomes the tyrannical president of Panem, 18-year-old Coriolanus Snow remains the last hope for his fading lineage. With the 10th annual Hunger Games fast approaching, the young Snow becomes alarmed when he's assigned to mentor Lucy Gray Baird. Uniting their instincts for showmanship and political savvy, they race against time to ultimately reveal who's a songbird and who's a snake.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games
AMC.HD.us2.description: In what was once North America, the Capitol of Panem maintains its hold on its 12 districts by forcing them each to select a boy and a girl, called Tributes, to compete in a nationally televised event called the Hunger Games. Every citizen must watch as the youths fight to the death until only one remains. District 12 Tribute Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) has little to rely on, other than her hunting skills and sharp instincts, in an arena where she must weigh survival against love.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
AMC.HD.us2.description: After arriving safely home from their unprecedented victory in the 74th Annual Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) and Peeta Mellark (Josh Hutcherson) discover that they must do a quick turnaround and begin a Victors Tour. As she and Peeta travel throughout the districts, Katniss senses a rebellion is stirring. However, President Snow (Donald Sutherland) proves that he is still very much in control when word comes of a cruel change in the rules for the upcoming 75th Hunger Games.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amarte es mi fortaleza
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cuando Rafael fue testigo de un asesinato, tuvo que huir y dejar atrás a su esposa Berenice sin dar ninguna explicación. Pero poco después, ella descubre que está embarazada y su amor por Rafael es su mayor fortaleza.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Nos quitó el derecho a tener hijos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rosalba autoriza una cirugía para impedir que su hija, menor de edad, quede embarazada por tercera vez. Alega que su nuero no se responsabiliza por sus dos hijas y ahora quiere un varón.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Pequeño inocente; Turismo sexual
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Liliana creía que su esposo recaudaba dinero para tratar el cáncer de su mascota. Catalina quien fue víctima de trata de blancas y obligada a prostituirse en México, demanda a su verdugo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La nieta; Divorcio ventajoso
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Viviana y Mariano son una pareja de adultos mayores, pero él tiene una amante joven. Laura está inhabilitada y recibe compensación económica, su esposo quiere el divorcio y muchos beneficios.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amor y perdón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Natalia pierde a su bebé por la mala praxis médica de Daniel. El destino los une tiempo después, pero para que el amor surja entre ellos él debe ser perdonado por el error que cometió.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amigas del alma
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cuando Benjamín engaña a Amalia y queda embarazada, pierde el respaldo de sus padres. Entonces, su amiga Sandra se convierte en su único apoyo, demostrando el valor de la amistad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una injusticia contra mi madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hilda es acusada injustamente del asesinato de su esposo, Ramiro, y la policía la atrapa. Su mayor dolor no es estar en la cárcel, sino que Mariano, su hijo, dude de ella.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una probadita y ya
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La presión social, la situación económica y los problemas en el seno de su familiar empujan a Ana al mundo del alcohol y las drogas. Su fuerte adicción la lleva a convertirse en una indigente.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Juegos del destino
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Carlos y Talía se alejan de su hija Eli, quien comienza a beber y cae en un espiral autodestructivo por seguir el mal ejemplo de su novio, cuando sus padres quieren intervenir, ya es muy tarde.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Nuevos aliados
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Circe comienza a sentir la ira de su padre. Él hace todo lo posible para dejarla sin aliados. Ramona delata cuál es la ruta de escape de Circe.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amigos por entretenimiento
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Esaú y Adrián deben superar el reto del jardinero para ganar una sala completamente equipada. Yolanda y Erik quieren ganar un viaje a Cancún, aunque deben usar comodines si quieren avanzar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El dilema
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: A Citlali, Beto y Jacinto les llega el mismo mensaje y deducen que deben resolver un pendiente en común, ponerse de acuerdo no será fácil, el tiempo en contra saca lo peor de cada uno de ellos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi media hermana es la amante de mi marido
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras ofrecerle trabajo en el negocio, Hilda acusa a Eugenia, su media hermana, de convertirse en la amante de José, su esposo. Además, responsabiliza a ambos del quiebre de la tienda.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me están comiendo los intereses
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Disna pide un préstamo y está presionada porque cada día paga más dinero y la deuda sigue creciendo. Paola, su nuera, busca a un supuesto prestamista y arrastra a Bertha para que se endeude.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sin truco no hay magia; Disgusto vaginal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Vanessa quiere la custodia de su hijo porque Raúl le enseñó magia y se ganan la vida con trucos en la calle. Marta recauda dinero para ayudar a Brenda a combatir el cáncer, pero ella está sana.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mellizos sin madre; Aceite caliente
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dos hermanos gemelos demandan a su madre porque no están de acuerdo con el uso que hace de sus redes sociales. La mujer publica fotos sexualmente comprometedoras y busca pareja en todos los sitios web de citas. Ariel aumentó el tráfico en las redes sociales del negocio de su esposa con una práctica que lleva a cabo con todas las chicas que conoce: les rocía aceite en las nalgas, lo cual atrae seguidores.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me cansé de cuidar a mi suegra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Elvira está muy estresada por cuidar a su suegra enferma tras un accidente que la mantiene en cama. Felipe, su pareja, se debate entre apoyar a su mamá y a su esposa. Sus hermanos lo presionan.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Encuentro en el rancho
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras sentar a varios de sus enemigos en una misma mesa, Gavino le propone a Diego un trato que no lo dejará indiferente. Circe busca la manera de salvar su negocio y matar a su padre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Pancakes asesinos; La tribu equivocada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Nancy demanda a su hermana, por ella casi muere ahogada en una competencia de "pancakes". Héctor pide el divorcio y la custodia de sus hijas, su esposa lo traicionó con quien menos lo esperaba.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La detective; Sexo para heredar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ashly contrató a un detective para aclarar el crimen de su esposo, pero ella lo resolvió y no quiere pagarle. Andrea culpa a Ruby y a Margy de la muerte de su padre y se disputan la herencia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Confianza
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tamara intenta seducir al profesor de Matemáticas y piensa que él está de acuerdo. Aníbal se convierte en su capricho, pero su actitud desencadena la desconfianza en el matrimonio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me están comiendo los intereses
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Disna pide un préstamo y está presionada porque cada día paga más dinero y la deuda sigue creciendo. Paola, su nuera, busca a un supuesto prestamista y arrastra a Bertha para que se endeude.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Obsesión por títere; Semen en mi ojo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hijo de Daniela y José es autista, tiene problemas de comunicación, pero si le dan su títere favorito no para de hablar, sus padres no saben qué hacer. Valentina sufre una enfermedad sexual.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Salvando a mi hija; Síndrome de Tourette
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luis y Pierina tienen una hija con cáncer que no quiere someterse a quimioterapia. Además, Raúl padece el síndrome de Tourette y siente que su novia no lo comprende, solo lo hace sufrir.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El hijo en mi vientre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mayra y Francisco sueñan con ser padres, pero caen en manos de un médico inescrupuloso que los estafa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Bebé en venta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Julissa es una adolescente embarazada que busca la forma de ocultar su situación. Una amiga la convence de vender a su bebé y así contactan a Sandra, quien está desesperada por ser madre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Necesito a mi madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Elisa está agobiada con la maternidad y descuida a su madre, que se pierde. Elisa se siente culpable de la situación y descubre cuánto necesita a su mamá.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Números que cambian vidas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Azul, una joven terapeuta que ayuda a muchos a lidiar con la violencia doméstica, es víctima del hostigamiento de su propia madre. Necesita probarse a sí misma que su labor es importante.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Quiero justicia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Paulina, ahora adolescente, canaliza toda la frustración de sus traumas infantiles con un comportamiento cargado de ira y agresividad. Tras años de abandono, su padre regresa, justo a tiempo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Encuentro en el rancho
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras sentar a varios de sus enemigos en una misma mesa, Gavino le propone a Diego un trato que no lo dejará indiferente. Circe busca la manera de salvar su negocio y matar a su padre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Gritos y aberraciones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Héctor y Ruth compiten por un set de entretenimiento, ella los sorprende al expresar su emoción. Rodrigo y Fabiola buscan duplicar sus regalos, sus escapes son de antología.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Libertad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gregorio encuentra la valentía para escapar y denunciar violentos abusos laborales en la fábrica de su tío, pero pone en peligro su vida y la de sus padres, quienes tienen una gran deuda.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me cansé de cuidar a mi suegra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Elvira está muy estresada por cuidar a su suegra enferma tras un accidente que la mantiene en cama. Felipe, su pareja, se debate entre apoyar a su mamá y a su esposa. Sus hermanos lo presionan.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Se hace la loca para no trabajar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Enrique afirma que necesita internar a su esposa, quien está deprimida tras ser despedida. Señala que no cumple sus responsabilidades como madre y esposa, pese a recibir terapias psiquiátricas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Prensa secuestrada; Golpéame please
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Kelvin y Lorena son esposos y periodistas, ella lo envía a entrevistar a un narcotraficante, pero lo secuestran y casi muere. Sharon contrata a Pedro para que le pegue, pero todo sale mal.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La diablita; Información expuesta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sufre de "bullying" y su madrastra la maquilla de muñeca diabólica para que huyan de ella. También, Danny es un usurero que da dinero en efectivo a cambio de usar las tarjetas de sus deudores.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Soy su cuñada, no su empleada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jade accede a un acuerdo con su hermano y cuñada para hacer los oficios del hogar y cuidar el bebé de la pareja, pero cree que ahora se están aprovechando. La jornada es de 12 horas diarias.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Durmiendo con el enemigo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La Mami Chula está desesperada y siente que su siempre amado Diego puede ser su salvación. No sabe que él espera su mejor momento para atacar. Gavino discute con Augusto y manda a eliminarlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me dejaste colgada; Pancho y Romeo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ivandra queda colgada en una pared de escalar, cuando John deja de sujetarla, ella sufre daños en la muñeca. Los Pony Play se disfrazan y Pancho demanda a su esposa por maltrato animal.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El bebé de la Bella Durmiente; Gaucho con las bolas grandes
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luis le paga a la esposa de Joel para alquilar su vientre, pero ella cae en coma. Por otro lado, Hilario es un gaucho que maneja con mucha destreza las boleadoras y los tambores.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mensajero de amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Danny y sus amigos deciden montar un negocio de mensajería especializada. Uno de sus primeros trabajos es un anuncio para Ana, pero se confunden y Pepe le entrega el mensaje equivocado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Poseído por mamá; Fish spa chupitos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Orlando pide que su hermano Neifry deje de comportarse como su madre fallecida. Carla se infecta con una bacteria al hacerse un tratamiento de belleza con peces, ahora exige que cierren el spa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La niña emoticones; Gimnasia y proteína
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mariana cubre con emoticones el rostro de su hija con síndrome de Down para subir sus fotos a las redes sociales. José exige que su esposa deje su obsesión con el fisicoculturismo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La justicia en tus manos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alexa no puede soportar que Darío le pida matrimonio a Camila y lo acusa de violación para meterlo a la cárcel. Sin embargo, gracias a Luisa hay pruebas de su mentira.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Donde nace el amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Roscio es una mujer ambiciosa que decide entregar a su sobrina María Eugenia por dinero. Finalmente, Maru consigue un hogar donde hay amor, pero la inagotable codicia de su tía la persigue.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Caminar juntos por la vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El día de su boda, Alicia es arrollada por un automóvil y queda inválida. Su novio, Ricardo, la abandona, pero Gustavo llega a su vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Felipa: Un grito por todas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Felipa sufre la brutal muerte de su hija, quien fue violada y asesinada. La joven delataba en su blog a los responsables de atacar a mujeres indefensas y la indiferencia de las autoridades.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Paola: Red de engaños
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Paola instala una app de citas y conoce a quien parece ser el hombre de sus sueños. Cuando descubre un video sexual suyo en internet se entera de que él es Jimmy, El gurú de la seducción.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La Mami Chula está desesperada y siente que su siempre amado Diego puede ser su salvación. No sabe que él espera su mejor momento para atacar. Gavino discute con Augusto y manda a eliminarlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El arca de Noé
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sharon y Stephany deben armar el Arca de Noé para ganar una recámara infantil. Abraham y Alberto buscan el auto. Mónica y Carlos enfrentan un reto para llevarse dinero en efectivo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tictac tictac
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ofelia, enfocada en su labor como periodista, ha evadido una situación grave hasta que alguien le hace concientizar que debe detener a su mellizo, Patricio, quien es una persona peligrosa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Soy su cuñada, no su empleada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jade accede a un acuerdo con su hermano y cuñada para hacer los oficios del hogar y cuidar el bebé de la pareja, pero cree que ahora se están aprovechando. La jornada es de 12 horas diarias.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por la herencia son capaces de todo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Liliana asegura que sus hermanos quieren dejar morir a su madre, de 89 años, para quedarse con sus bienes. Su hijo y nuera, con quienes vive, no la tratan bien ni le brindan apoyo económico.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Slime; La canción de la desgracia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un bebé muere por un "slime" que hicieron sus hermanos mientras estaban con su madrastra. Pide una canción biográfica para su matrimonio, el resultado es tan desastroso que se cancela la boda.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Juan@ la loca; Cucaracha Challenge
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juan está convencido de que es una mujer, su esposa, Liscar, le exige que vaya a terapia. Ariana tiene muchas cucarachas en su casa y como su amiga Claudia les tiene miedo, la demanda.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Se desvive por un chacal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sandra está indignada porque su amiga Lizeth le debe tres meses de renta y ese dinero lo usa para satisfacer a su novio, Brayan. La confrontación aumenta cuando busca traer el chacal a casa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El llamado de la justicia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gavino logra sembrar la desconfianza entre Circe y Diego. Ahora, ambos deben decidir qué harán para solucionar su situación. Augusto quiere aprovecharse de Diana, la hermana de Marlene.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Letra pequeña; Lo manejo yo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ivonne alteró la letra pequeña de un contrato para pagar menos, el prestamista lo descubre y la demanda. Acusan a Nicole de ser una mala influencia que arruina la carrera de un cantante urbano.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Historia de una prosti; Estafa universitaria
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mía estudia periodismo en una academia de Artes y Letras; allí, ganó un concurso literario, pero la organizadora no quiere entregarle el premio porque sostiene que su historia, su vida como prostituta, no es un buen ejemplo para los demás estudiantes. Michel se disfrazó de Kory y se presentó a un examen con la intención de ayudarla, pero fue descubierto y ambos fueron sancionados y expulsados del sistema educativo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Creer en el amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Claudia vive con su padre desde que Luis la abandonó embarazada. Ya no cree en el amor, pero su hija Luisa quiere para ella un príncipe azul.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por la herencia son capaces de todo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Liliana asegura que sus hermanos quieren dejar morir a su madre, de 89 años, para quedarse con sus bienes. Su hijo y nuera, con quienes vive, no la tratan bien ni le brindan apoyo económico.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La doula; The sugar cake
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Su esposo quiere despedir a la doula por insistir en un embarazo al margen de médicos. Los celos y favoritismo de su novia y supervisora fueron la causa de que la tuviera que despedir.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Niño regalado; La entrometida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Elizabeth confía en David para que sus hijos crucen la frontera, pero cuando el menor desaparece, ella pide la custodia del mayor. Andrea busca desalojar a su madrastra porque mató a su padre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La bondad que hay que tus actos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Historias dramáticas de la vida diaria donde solo un milagro de la Virgen de Guadalupe puede ayudar a superar desafíos y problemas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cómo olvidar a Alma
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Historias dramáticas de la vida diaria donde solo un milagro de la Virgen de Guadalupe puede ayudar a superar desafíos y problemas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tres generaciones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Para Adriana es difícil superar el divorcio de sus padres y se deja influenciar por malas compañías. Ella y su mamá se mudan a la casa de la abuela y las tres generaciones juntas enfrentan una nueva vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Romina: Una nueva vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Romina se lleva mal con su mamá y se muda con su papá quien le permite organizar una fiesta donde ella es abusada. Arrepentida, regresa con su madre y ambas cuentan su experiencia en un blog.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Asunción: Decidir una vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En un accidente, Asunción pierde a su bebé y ya no puede embarazarse de nuevo, como ginecóloga apoya a tres de sus pacientes a tomar decisiones determinantes sobre la vida y la maternidad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El llamado de la justicia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gavino logra sembrar la desconfianza entre Circe y Diego. Ahora, ambos deben decidir qué harán para solucionar su situación. Augusto quiere aprovecharse de Diana, la hermana de Marlene.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Los conocimientos necesarios
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Felipe y Diana, esposos, desean lograr un súper escape para llevarse un automóvil. Los hermanos Andrés y Diana enfrentan el reto Trapitos al Sol para tener la opción de duplicar sus premios.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Traición
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Abigail, stripper, despierta con un ultimátum, pero busca una oportunidad para vivir, al recordar una misteriosa despedida de soltero demasiado bien pagada por alguien anónimo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Se desvive por un chacal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sandra está indignada porque su amiga Lizeth le debe tres meses de renta y ese dinero lo usa para satisfacer a su novio, Brayan. La confrontación aumenta cuando busca traer el chacal a casa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Alquilé mi vientre, pero me enamoré
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Edgar vive con su novia y, de común acuerdo, le propone a Carmen embarazarla a cambio de dinero. Ahora ella quiere convertirse en su esposa y lo presiona con la posibilidad de perder al bebé.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dormir o comer; Amor a la muerte
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Le dan somníferos para que se mantenga delgada y pueda modelar. Practicaba sexo extremo con la hermana de su esposa, ella muere y le deja una herencia que no puede cobrar por estar involucrado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Contagiando hepatitis; Fianza sin retorno
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Contagia de hepatitis A a su nuero y a un amigo, pero no a los nietos. Alina pierde su bote tras ponerlo como colateral de la fianza del hermano de su nuera Fary, ahora quiere que se lo pague.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi hijo me odia por culpa de mi madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Juego de engaños
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Después de darle mucho amor a Circe, Diego le hace una oferta que no podrá cumplir. Ella asegura que pronto recuperarán la droga. Los colombianos están inquietos con el regreso de Joselito.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Todo por amor; Viviendo en un storage
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Maritza quiere internar a su padre en un ancianato porque tiene Alzheimer, pero el hombre no quiere porque se siente que está en perfecto estado y aún se siente útil. En otro caso, Kysha perdió su trabajo como seguridad en un hotel porque tenía orden de no dejar pasar a prostitutas y dejó pasar a Frida y a Cindy, sin saber que ellas estaban intentando conquistar a algún hombre adinerado de los que estaban hospedados.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: LALIGA VS es un proyecto de LALIGA y los clubes que tiene el objetivo de erradicar el odio dentro y fuera del fútbol, promoviendo una sociedad respetuosa e inclusiva en todos sus ámbitos. Esta plataforma busca inspirar y sensibilizar a los aficionados.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Especiales LaLiga fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Castellón - Cádiz
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La igualdad es la nota imperante en LaLiga HyperMotion, la Segunda División de fútbol español. Muchos son los aspirantes al ascenso, bien en busca de las dos plazas directas o por la vía del emocionante playoff con el que culmina la temporada. Sin duda, una competición con equipos de primera.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LALIGA VS es una plataforma de LALIGA cuya misión es erradicar el odio tanto dentro fuera de los estadios, visibilizando y condenando todas aquellas conductas que no tienen cabida en el fútbol. Este podcast trae charlas entre referentes del mundo del fútbol y de otros sectores para hablar del odio en los estadios, empezando por el racismo, con personajes que cuentan sus historias en primera persona.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Córdoba - Albacete
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La igualdad es la nota imperante en LaLiga HyperMotion, la Segunda División de fútbol español. LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Málaga - Sporting
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La Rosaleda empuja: Málaga de amplitud, centros medidos y presión tras pérdida para instalarse en campo rival. El Sporting intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar cuando encuentre salida; si controla el ritmo y acierta en la primera llegada, puede convertir el duelo en una noche de detalles.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Cádiz - Deportivo
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Cádiz necesita un partido de mínimos: bloque compacto, control emocional y precisión en los centros para vivir cerca del área rival sin desordenarse. El Dépor, instalado en la zona alta, buscará mandar con ritmo y amplitud; si convierte su dominio en remates claros y gana la batalla de segundas jugadas, puede inclinar un duelo exigente en las áreas.

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Manchester City TV – 36. Spieltag
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Manchester City – FC Brentford
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die teuerste und die vielleicht auch beste Liga der Welt im Mutterland des Fußballs. Alle Spiele, alle Spieler, die Trainer und jede Menge Hintergrundinfos aus den Stadien und Trainingsplätzen. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Polen! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Ekstraklasa (32. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Hier können die Zuschauer die beeindruckendsten Tore der höchsten polnischen Liga nochmals sehen. Alle Tore werden von renommierten Fußball-Experten kommentiert. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Premier League
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: 36. Spieltag: Manchester City – FC Brentford
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die teuerste und die vielleicht auch beste Liga der Welt im Mutterland des Fußballs. Alle Spiele, alle Spieler, die Trainer und jede Menge Hintergrundinfos aus den Stadien und Trainingsplätzen. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Primeira Liga
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Benfica Lissabon – Sporting Braga (33. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Willkommen zur höchsten Spielklasse im portugiesischen Männerfußball. Eine Saison erstreckt sich über 34 Spieltage, wobei die Partien von Mitte August bis Ende Mai oder Anfang Juni ausgetragen werden. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: U17-Europameisterschaft der Frauen
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Deutschland U17 F – Nordirland U17 F (Gruppe A, 3. Spieltag)

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Saudi-Arabien! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Saudi Pro League (32. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Das Magazin konzentriert sich auf den Fußball in Saudi-Arabien. Es bietet eine umfassende Berichterstattung über die nationale Liga, wichtige Spiele und Spieler sowie Entwicklungen im saudischen Fußball insgesamt. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Brasilien! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Campeonato Brasileiro (15. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Es werden alle Tore der höchsten brasilianischen Spielklasse, der 20 Teams umfassenden Série A, gezeigt. Darüber hinaus gibt es alles Wissenwerte zum Fußball in Brasilien, der viele Stars hervorbringt. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Argentinien! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Liga Profesional Apertura (Achtelfinale)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Fußball aus der ganzen Welt mit allen Höhepunkten aus den internationalen Top-Ligen. In dieser Ausgebe von "scooore" werden die spektakulärsten und wichtigsten Szenen aus der höchsten Argentinischen Fußball-Liga gezeigt. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: 16 Vereine kämpfen um den polnischen Meistertitel. Nach der Hin- und Rückserie kommen die besten acht Teams in die Meisterschaftsrunde, in der nur noch ein Mal jeder gegen jeden gespielt wird. (Senderinfo).

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 328: Chimaev vs. Strickland - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Two titles are on the line when UFC returns to Prudential Center in Newark, New Jersey on Saturday, May 10 for UFC 328. In the main event, undefeated champion Khamzat Chimaev defends the middleweight title for the first time since winning it last August in a clash with former titleholder Sean Strickland. In the co-main event, flyweight champion Joshua “The Fearless” Van defends his title against Japanese contender Tatsuro “The Best” Taira in the first UFC championship fight between competitors born in the 21st century.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA TOP GOALS GUAYRE BETANCOR - LALIGA TOP GOALS GUAYRE BETANCOR
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: A selection of top goals from Guayre, a leading light for Villarreal in their push to become one of LaLiga's elite.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Della Maddalena vs. Prates - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The month of April wraps with a return to Meta APEX for a UFC Fight Night event capped by a thrilling clash between Top 10 featherweights Aljamain “Funk Master” Sterling and Youssef “The Moroccan Devil” Zalal

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - UFC Fight Flashback 1004: Teixeira vs. Prochazka
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 275 featured Czech MMA star Jiri Prochazka in his third Octagon outing as he sought UFC gold against newly minted light heavyweight champion, Glover Teixeira. Relive their fight with enhanced replays and angles, new footage, and exclusive audio.

unifi.unifisports1.my.description: A selection of top goals from Guayre, a leading light for Villarreal in their push to become one of LaLiga's elite.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Kejohanan Piala Emas Khir Johari Edisi Ke-58, 2026 - Peringkat Separuh Akhir 1 (Berpasukan Lelaki)
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Kejohanan Sepaktakraw Piala Emas Khir Johari Ke-58 Tahun 2026 kembali lagi! 21 pasukan akan berentap untuk merebut kejuaraan. Hanya satu pasukan yang akan dinobatkan sebagai juara. Saksikan aksi penuh segalanya secara langsung di saluran Unifi Sports 1 atau strim melalui aplikasi Unifi TV 2.0.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Unleashed - 1801 - British Invasion
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: It's a British invasion of the world-famous Octagon as the top stars from across the pond show off their incredible skills on UFC Unleashed. Featuring Tom Aspinall, “Meatball” Molly McCann, and Paddy “The Baddy” Pimblett.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA TOP GOALS GUAYRE BETANCOR - LALIGA TOP GOALS GUAYRE BETANCOR
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: A selection of top goals from Guayre, a leading light for Villarreal in their push to become one of LaLiga's elite.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 313: Pereira vs Ankalaev
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: After a historic 2024 that saw him defend his UFC light heavyweight title three times with three knockouts, Brazilian superstar Alex Pereira begins the new year in Las Vegas with a main event clash against number one contender Magomed Ankalaev. Plus former interim lightweight champion Justin Gaithje battles Rafael Fiziev for the second time, and much much more on UFC Reloaded.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 11
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 6
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - UFC Fight Flashback 1005: Usman vs. Edwards 2
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 278 was headlined by a rematch between long reigning middleweight king Kamaru “The Nigerian Nightmare” Usman and UFC vet Leon “Rocky” Edwards. See their fight like never before with enhanced replays and angles, new footage, and exclusive audio.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 315: Muhammad vs Della Maddalena
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: When the Octagon returns to Montreal for the first time since 2015, fans are treated to a stacked card headlined by a championship doubleheader. In the main event, Belal Muhammad defends his welterweight crown for the first time against Australian powerhouse Jack Della Maddalena, and Manon Fiorot battles to be the first female French champion against Flyweight phenom Valentina Shevchenko. Plus, the return of Jose Aldo and much more on UFC Reloaded.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Ultimate Knockouts - 1002 - Ultimate Knockouts "Welterweights
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC Ultimate Knockouts brings you a collection of the best welterweight KOs.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Countdown - UFC 323: Dvalishvili vs Yan 2
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 323 Countdown previews two title fights. In the main event, bantamweight king Merab Dvalishvili looks to defend his crown for the fourth time in 2025 against Petr Yan. In the co-main event, flyweight champion Alexandre Pantoja battles Joshua Van.
